items.title: Watching Dominique Malonga and Awa Fam just figure things out in real time has been fun. The combination of the confidence growing with their versatility...you can just see it.

items.title: Fever clearly having a great time tonight. Bree Hall shot fake, then a drive to the cup and she's got a massive smile. She chest bumps former college teammate Raven Johnson after a stop on the other end. Fever up 34.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Fever clearly having a great time tonight. Bree Hall shot fake, then a drive to the cup and she's got a massive smile. She chest bumps former college teammate Raven Johnson after a stop on the other end. Fever up 34.

items.title: Hall hits a corner three in front of the Fever bench. It's her first-ever regular season basket in a Fever uniform. Huge cheers from her teammates, and Hall herself grins as she runs back to defense. It's 89-58 Fever after three quarters.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Hall hits a corner three in front of the Fever bench. It's her first-ever regular season basket in a Fever uniform. Huge cheers from her teammates, and Hall herself grins as she runs back to defense. It's 89-58 Fever after three quarters.

items.title: One day before her 23rd birthday, Bree Hall gets her first minutes of the season. Second time being activated as a development player.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
One day before her 23rd birthday, Bree Hall gets her first minutes of the season. Second time being activated as a development player.

The Ohio native came right in and knocked down a 3-pointer.

Fever cruising vs. the Sparks, +31 after 3.

items.title: Sparks trail Fever 89-58 after three. 214 points allowed by the Sparks in the last 70 minutes—or 3.06 per minute. An almost unfathomable number.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks trail Fever 89-58 after three. 214 points allowed by the Sparks in the last 70 minutes—or 3.06 per minute. An almost unfathomable number.

items.title: In their last 60 minutes of basketball, the Los Angeles Sparks have given up 182 points on 53-48-86 shooting splits. Opponents have mustered a 68.8 TS% in that time. Sparks have given up 24 made 3s, 68 paint points, and 38 free throws.

items.title: Fever handling the Sparks, up 57-37 at halftime. They shot 58% and made 15/17 FTs. Good ball movement and decisive attacks. Also key: just six turnovers.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever handling the Sparks, up 57-37 at halftime. They shot 58% and made 15/17 FTs. Good ball movement and decisive attacks. Also key: just six turnovers.

Boston with 17pts, Mitchell and Harris each have 11.

items.title: Dominant first half for the Fever. They're up 57-37 at the break thanks to a monster 30-16 second quarter. Aliyah Boston already has 17 points and 8 rebounds.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Dominant first half for the Fever. They're up 57-37 at the break thanks to a monster 30-16 second quarter. Aliyah Boston already has 17 points and 8 rebounds.

items.title: Halftime: Fever 57, Sparks 37. Stop me if you’ve heard this before, but Los Angeles’ defense has supplied zero resistance. Indiana has 30 paint points and 17 FTA. Sparks are shooting 37%. Another long night is in store.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Fever 57, Sparks 37. Stop me if you’ve heard this before, but Los Angeles’ defense has supplied zero resistance. Indiana has 30 paint points and 17 FTA. Sparks are shooting 37%. Another long night is in store.

items.title: Erica Wheeler took an inadvertent left forearm to the face from Dearica Hamby as Hamby was getting over the top of a screen and Wheeler was diving in to double. Wheeler was shaken up and down for a while before being helped to her feet. Wheeler has gone to the locker room.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Erica Wheeler took an inadvertent left forearm to the face from Dearica Hamby as Hamby was getting over the top of a screen and Wheeler was diving in to double. Wheeler was shaken up and down for a while before being helped to her feet. Wheeler has gone to the locker room.

items.title: Erica Wheeler gets hit in the face by her own teammate Dearica Hamby (by accident) and goes down for a while. Hamby instantly recognizes her mistake. Wheeler holding a towel over her face and stopped for a beat before being helped off the floor.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Erica Wheeler gets hit in the face by her own teammate Dearica Hamby (by accident) and goes down for a while. Hamby instantly recognizes her mistake. Wheeler holding a towel over her face and stopped for a beat before being helped off the floor.

items.title: Two nights ago, the Sparks gave up 60 points strictly on 3-pointers to Toronto. Tonight, they’ve already allowed 28 paint points to Indiana and there’s still 3:22 until halftime. If ain’t one thing, it’s the other. Sparks trail Fever 48-31.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Two nights ago, the Sparks gave up 60 points strictly on 3-pointers to Toronto. Tonight, they’ve already allowed 28 paint points to Indiana and there’s still 3:22 until halftime. If ain’t one thing, it’s the other. Sparks trail Fever 48-31.

items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Aliyah Boston, Ty Harris, and Monique Billings: 30 points
The Sparks: 31 points

It's 48-31 Fever. Fever are dominating. Timeout, LA.

items.title: Sparks trail Fever 27-21 after one. Los Angeles shot 39% but assisted 7 of their 9 made field goals. Ariel Atkins and Nneka Ogwumike lead the way with 5 points apiece. Indiana shot 60%. Aliyah Boston has 8 points for the Fever.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks trail Fever 27-21 after one. Los Angeles shot 39% but assisted 7 of their 9 made field goals. Ariel Atkins and Nneka Ogwumike lead the way with 5 points apiece. Indiana shot 60%. Aliyah Boston has 8 points for the Fever.
